_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate and manage the overall service provided to a customer end-to-end.
reference_document_element_description: Manage data service level agreements with internal consumers, including SLA definition, performance measurement, breach reporting, and service improvement planning.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-009 (OP, cosine: 0.488), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.478).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.500). Shared vocabulary: [manage, service]. DCWF-only terms [coordinate, customer, end, overall, provided] vs WIDAI-only terms [agreements, breach, consumers, data, definition, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.888, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.036 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (87.1%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Coordinate and manage the overall service provided to a customer end-to-end." and "Manage data service level agreements with internal consumers, including SLA defi". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.502 ≈ STS 0.500 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [manage, service] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [manage, service]. DCWF-only: [coordinate, customer, end, overall, provided]. WIDAI-only: [agreements, breach, consumers, data, definition, improvement].
